common.serverOffline: Server is not running. Start it with: npm run dev
common.serverOfflineHint: Run 'npm run dev' in the project folder, or add the startup script to auto-start on boot.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: AI Cinematic Content Factory
dashboard.importUrlPlaceholder: Paste TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter/X or Facebook URL...
dashboard.ytdlpNotAvailable: yt-dlp not installed — configure path in Settings
dashboard.supportedPlatforms: Supports TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter/X, Facebook

scriptEditor.title: Script Editor
scriptEditor.subtitle: Write your script and auto-generate cinematic scenes
scriptEditor.scriptPlaceholder: Write your script here. Each sentence becomes a visual scene...
scriptEditor.writeFirst: Write your script and click Preview
scriptEditor.aiTopicPlaceholder: e.g. 'Never give up on your dreams', 'City life at night'...
scriptEditor.groqNotConfigured: Groq API key not configured — add it in Settings
scriptEditor.jamendoHint: Add a Jamendo Client ID in Settings to search music online

tts.title: Text to Speech
tts.subtitle: Convert text to natural speech with AI voices — 50+ voices, 18 languages
tts.textPlaceholder: Type or paste the text you want to convert to speech...
tts.noHistoryHint: Generate your first TTS audio on the left
tts.transcribeSubtitle: Upload audio or select from history to transcribe
tts.dragDropAudio: Drag & drop audio file or click to browse
tts.supportedFormats: MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A, AAC, FLAC

image.title: Image Generator
image.subtitle: Generate images from text prompts using AI
image.promptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want to generate...
image.dropFile: Drop a .txt file or click to load prompts
image.libraryEmptyHint: Generate images and save them to build your library

storyboard.title: Storyboard
storyboard.subtitle: Script → Voice → Images → Video — full pipeline
storyboard.loadTemplateFirst: Load your prompt template above first — it contains the channel knowledge needed to generate topics.
storyboard.topicPlaceholder: Topic or idea for the video...
storyboard.systemPromptPlaceholder: Custom system prompt for AI script generation...
storyboard.scriptPlaceholder: Write or paste your narration script here...
storyboard.stylePlaceholder: Custom system prompt for image prompt generation...
storyboard.clearImagesConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all generated images? This cannot be undone.
storyboard.noMusicCached: No music files yet. Upload an audio file.
storyboard.templateHint: Paste or upload your full prompt file — all sections (script rules, image style, metadata) are auto-extracted and used in each step.
storyboard.templatePlaceholder: Paste your full prompt template here...
storyboard.promptPartsHint: Edit each block below. They combine into the full system prompt. Preamble = role/persona, Knowledge = channel data, Stage Rules = task instructions, Operator Rules = always-active constraints.
storyboard.noPromptSection: No prompt parts found. Upload a template first.
storyboard.fullPromptHint: This is the complete system prompt sent to the AI. You can edit it before generating.
storyboard.noSegments: No timeline segments yet. Build a timeline from your generated images.
storyboard.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this project?
storyboard.videoGenDesc: Generate short video clips from your prompts using Google Gemini Veo. Each prompt produces a standalone video clip that will be used in place of a static image.
storyboard.videoGenNote: Video generation takes longer than images (30-120s per clip). Requires a Gemini API key with Veo access.
storyboard.installExtensionHint2: Install the Han2YT Chrome extension and reload this page. Open Google Flow, switch to Video mode, then come back here to generate.
storyboard.extensionHintImage: The extension will open {{provider}} tab, type each prompt one by one, wait for the generated image, and upload it back here.
storyboard.extensionHintVideo: The extension will type each prompt into Google Flow, wait for the generated video, and upload it back here.
storyboard.extensionDevToolsWarn: Close DevTools (F12) on the target tab and do not dismiss the yellow "debugging" bar while running.
storyboard.extensionVideoModeWarn: Make sure Google Flow is set to Video mode. Close DevTools (F12) on the target tab.
storyboard.installExtensionHint3: Install the Han2YT Chrome extension and reload this page. The extension will open {{provider}}, type each prompt, wait for the image, and send it back here automatically.

library.title: Scene Library
library.generateFirst: Generate videos to populate the library
library.emptyHint: Generate your first video to populate the scene library. Each scene generated is stored here for reuse.

editor.title: Video Editor
editor.noVideoSub: Create a video from Script Editor
editor.savedFromLibrary: Saved from library — no generation needed
editor.splitNoVideo: Assemble the video first to enable splitting.
editor.previewPlaceholder: Preview will appear here after assembly
editor.blurHint: Drag on video to draw a blur area
editor.blurTip: Click "+ Blur" on the player, then drag to mark areas
editor.textHint: Click on video to place text
editor.textTip: Click "+ Text" on the player, then click to place
editor.textReassemble: Re-assemble to burn text into video
editor.cropHint: Draw a rectangle to select the crop area
editor.aiCaptionEmpty: No AI caption yet. Click Generate to call Groq.
editor.uploadNotePlaceholder: Where did you post it? (e.g. TikTok @handle)
editor.aiCaptionMissingPrompt: Set a Groq API key in Settings to enable AI captions
editor.trimHint: Scrub the player to a position, then click In / Out to mark the range to keep.

splitter.title: Split video into scenes
splitter.description: Cut your {{duration}}s video into segments. Each segment becomes a scene you can apply effects, transitions, and subtitles to.

transform.logoHint: Drop on a corner below to position.
transform.footnote: Transforms apply live in the preview. Burning them into the rendered file requires a full FFmpeg install (configurable in Settings → FFmpeg path).

ai.title: AI Recommendations
ai.addScenes: Add scenes to get AI suggestions

player.videoTrackNotPlayable: Video track not playable in browser
player.codecExplain: The source uses a codec your browser cannot decode (likely AV1, HEVC, or a DASH video-only stream).
player.reencodingHint: The source uses a codec your browser cannot decode. Converting to H.264 — this can take 10–60s depending on length.
player.reencodeFailed: Re-encoding failed — try again, or restart the server if you just upgraded.

batch.title: Batch Generator
batch.subtitle: Generate multiple video variations from a single template

music.title: Background Music (Jamendo)
music.clientIdHint: Free API key from developer.jamendo.com — CC-licensed music

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure providers, narration, and system settings
settings.imageProvidersHint: Configure API keys for image generation. Providers are tried in priority order — free first, then paid. On rate limit, the system automatically falls back to the next provider.
settings.imageProvidersFallback: Priority: Google Imagen 3 → HuggingFace → Pollinations. Rate-limited providers are skipped automatically.
settings.geminiHint: Get your Gemini API key at aistudio.google.com → API Keys. Works on Free Tier — no billing required.
settings.leonardoHint: Get your API key at app.leonardo.ai → Settings → API Keys. Free plan: 150 tokens/day
settings.togetherHint: Get your free API key at api.together.xyz → Settings → API Keys
settings.pollinationsHint: No API key required — completely free and open
settings.huggingfaceHint: Get a free token at huggingface.co → Settings → Access Tokens
settings.chatgptHint: Get an API key at platform.openai.com → API Keys. Supports GPT Image 1, DALL-E 3, DALL-E 2.
settings.grokHint: Get an API key at console.x.ai → API Keys. Uses Grok 2 Image model.
settings.falHint: Sign up for $10 free credits at fal.ai → Dashboard → Keys
settings.stabilityHint: Get 25 free credits at platform.stability.ai → Account → API Keys
settings.replicateHint: Create a token at replicate.com → Account → API Tokens
settings.appNameHint: Displayed in sidebar and browser tab
settings.appLogoUrlHint: URL to a square image (PNG/SVG). Leave empty for default icon.
settings.keyPoolHint: Add multiple keys — automatically rotates when one is rate-limited or quota-exceeded
settings.guideImagefxStep2: Sign in with your Google account
settings.guideImagefxStep4: Copy and paste the key above
settings.guideImagefxNote: Free tier: ~1500 requests/day per key. Add multiple keys to pool for more capacity.
settings.guideFlowTitle: Google Flow (Veo) — Requires Google Cloud project
settings.guideFlowStep1: Create a Google Cloud project at:
settings.guideFlowStep2: Enable the "Vertex AI API" in your project
settings.guideFlowStep3: Go to APIs & Services → Credentials → Create API key
settings.guideFlowStep4: Copy the Project ID from the Cloud Console dashboard
settings.guideFlowNote: Vertex AI has free quota for new accounts. Veo video generation may require billing enabled.
settings.guideMultiKey: Tip: Add multiple API keys from different Google accounts to the Key Pool below. The system automatically rotates to the next key when one hits its rate limit.
settings.voiceControlsDefaultsHint: These defaults are applied when creating new storyboard projects. You can override them per-project in the Audio step.
settings.fontHint: Leave blank to use default font. For Vietnamese text, use a Unicode font like Tahoma or Arial.
settings.addToPath: and add to PATH, or set full path above.
settings.llmProviderHint: Choose which LLM to use for script generation, topics, image prompts, and metadata.
settings.geminiHint: Get your API key from aistudio.google.com/apikey
settings.openrouterHint: Get your key at openrouter.ai/keys — many free models available
settings.cerebrasHint: Get your key at cloud.cerebras.ai — ultra-fast free inference
settings.grokLlmHint: Get your API key from console.x.ai
settings.openaiLlmHint: Get your API key from platform.openai.com
settings.anthropicHint: Get your API key from console.anthropic.com
settings.groqHint: Free API — fast LLM inference for script generation
settings.groqGuideStep2: Sign in and go to API Keys section
settings.groqGuideStep3: Click "Create API Key" and copy it
settings.groqGuideNote: Groq is free with generous limits (30 req/min). No credit card required.
settings.groqDescriptionPromptHint: System prompt used to rewrite social-media descriptions into your voice on import. The language used is determined by the Whisper Language setting above.
settings.groqDescriptionPromptLangHint: The server picks the English prompt when Whisper Language is 'en', and the Vietnamese prompt when it is 'vi'.
settings.groqDescriptionPromptPlaceholder: You are a social media caption writer…
settings.groqCreditTemplateHint: Appended to the AI caption when an author is detected. Available placeholders: {author}, {url}. Leave empty to disable.
settings.ytDlpHint: Path to yt-dlp binary for importing social media videos. Install: pip install yt-dlp
settings.introEnabledHint: Prepend an animated intro card to the assembled video
settings.outroEnabledHint: Append an animated outro card to the assembled video
settings.chromePathHint: Required for Remotion rendering. Leave blank to auto-detect.
settings.remotionNote: Remotion renders animated clips using Chrome. Install Google Chrome and set the path above if not auto-detected.
settings.platformDistributionHint: OAuth credentials let the app upload videos directly to social platforms on your behalf.
settings.youtubeSetupNote: Create an OAuth 2.0 client in Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials. Add authorized redirect URI: http://localhost:3002/api/oauth/youtube-shorts/callback
settings.tiktokSetupNote: Create an app at developers.tiktok.com. Add redirect URI: http://localhost:3002/api/oauth/tiktok/callback and enable Content Posting API scope.
settings.instagramSetupNote: Create a Meta app at developers.facebook.com. Add redirect URI: http://localhost:3002/api/oauth/instagram-reels/callback. Enable instagram_content_publish permission.

notifications.effectsSkippedMsg: Your FFmpeg build does not support motion filters (zoompan). Install full FFmpeg and set the path in Settings → FFmpeg Path to enable Ken Burns / pan / zoom effects.

repo.title: Video Repo
repo.subtitle: All assembled videos — group, tag, and reuse
repo.noVideosHint: Assemble a video and it appears here

channels.subtitle: Manage your platform channels and accounts
channels.name: Channel Name
channels.emptyHint: Add a channel to start distributing videos
channels.noProvider: No upload support for this platform yet
channels.oauthCredentialsHint: OAuth app keys required to connect channels
channels.captionTemplateHint: Auto-filled when distributing to this channel

distribution.workflowSteps: Select channels → Export & download → Upload manually → Mark as done
distribution.noChannelsHint: Go to the Channels page to add one

distributions.title: Distributions
distributions.subtitle: All channel distributions across your videos

storyboardList.title: Storyboard Projects
storyboardList.empty: No storyboard projects yet. Create one to get started.
storyboardList.nicheInputPlaceholder: Type a niche (e.g. Crypto, Horror, Fitness)...
storyboardList.noPromptYet: No prompt configured yet. Generate a template first.
storyboardList.aiPlaceholder: Tell AI what you want (e.g. "make topics focus on viral hooks", "add horror tone to scripts")...
storyboardList.globalPromptsHint: These are the default prompts used when a niche template doesn't have its own. Edit them to change the behavior for all new projects.
storyboardList.resetGlobalConfirm: Reset this prompt to the built-in default? Your custom edits will be lost.

drama.title: Drama Studio
drama.subtitle: AI-powered short drama production
drama.noProjectsHint: Create your first project to start producing AI drama
drama.projectTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Revenge of the Lost Heir
drama.storyInputPlaceholder: Paste your story idea, outline, script, or novel chapter here...
drama.noBeats: No beats yet. Generate an outline to create the story structure.
drama.noScript: No script yet. Generate one from the story outline.
drama.noCharacters: No characters yet. Extract them from the script.
drama.noLocations: No locations yet. Extract them from the script.
drama.noScenes: No scenes yet. Generate a storyboard from the script.
drama.audioComingSoon: Audio generation coming soon. Voice, music, and SFX will be generated from the script.
drama.subtitlesComingSoon: Subtitle generation coming soon. Captions will be auto-synced from dialogue.
drama.noPromptsYet: Generate prompts first in the Storyboard tab, or use Generate All Prompts.
drama.installExtensionHint: Install the Han2YT Chrome extension to generate images.
drama.clearImagesConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all generated images? This cannot be undone.
